scores.correctness_notes: Core answer is correct: juju.run() signature, Task attributes (results, status, success, stdout, stderr, return_code) all match gold standard. Misses message, log, id attributes and error conditions (ValueError, TimeoutError), but these are omissions not errors.
scores.hallucination_notes: task.raise_on_failure() is not in the gold standard; the gold standard states juju.run() itself raises TaskError on failure (not a Task method). This may be a fabricated convenience method, warranting a minor penalty.
